name: Easemob
description: Agora-backed Chinese IM cloud (环信) with chat, RTC, customer engagement and global infrastructure.

seo.title: Easemob — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: Easemob: Agora-backed Chinese IM cloud (环信) with chat, RTC, customer engagement and global infrastructure.

when_to_use: In-app IM SDK for Chinese consumer app messaging
Customer service live chat with agent routing
RTC video calling integration for social platform
Live streaming chat layer for Chinese content apps
Global IM infrastructure for apps targeting China market

pros: Proven at scale with large Chinese apps
Chat plus RTC in one SDK reduces vendors
Agora backing means solid media infrastructure
cons: Docs and console strongest in Chinese
Global pricing and support less dialed in
SDK size notable on mobile bundle budgets
Feature updates sometimes China-first, global later
review.verdict: Battle-tested Chinese IM cloud backed by Agora — ideal inside China, more friction for Western devs.
review.best_for: Apps targeting China needing chat and RTC with local infra and scale
review.not_for: Western startups wanting English-first docs and lean mobile SDKs
